statement.headerDoc:
STEP Brocard — Brocard's problem finite verification
  =====================================================

  Conjecture (Brocard 1876, Ramanujan 1913, OPEN 150 years):
    The only (n, m) with n! + 1 = m² are:
      n=4: 24 + 1 = 25 = 5²
      n=5: 120 + 1 = 121 = 11²
      n=7: 5040 + 1 = 5041 = 71²

  Verified computationally to n ≤ 10^9 (Berndt-Galway 2000).
  Rei STEP Brocard (2026-04-21): reproduced Lean 4 finite verification for n ∈ [1, 20].

  ★ Rei-lens finding (scripts/brocard-verify-rei-lens.ts) ★:
    Small-prime quadratic-residue prefilter gives 99%+ pass rate because
    for n
